rationale: Y independently re-derives the ground-truth reviewer's own reasoning (AutoWeightsLoader applies the mapper upstream for delegated loaders, direct loaders must self-apply it) with concrete file:line citations, surfaces a sharper version of the GT's 'test doesn't validate on a real checkpoint' concern, and explicitly flags the dropped hunyuan_image3_transformer.py diffusion loader — exactly the latent gap later filed as #4891. X's two comments are thinner: the 'dead code guard' comment is undercut by its own internal diagnostics (which called the same guard 'intentional defense, not dead code'), and its diffusion-loader check concluded there was no issue, actively missing the gap Y caught. Both are reasonably actionable with file:line anchors, but X's low recall, weaker grounding, and false gap_hit put it clearly behind Y.
